description: Expert logic puzzle solver that takes any logic puzzle as input and provides a detailed, step-by-step solution with clear reasoning. Handles riddles, grid puzzles, syllogisms, river-crossing problems, truth-teller/liar puzzles, constraint satisfaction, and more.

example_response.reasoning: Detailed step-by-step logical reasoning with deductions
example_response.solution: The final answer to the puzzle
example_response.verification: Verification that the solution satisfies all constraints
